Description: Assign accepted photo candidates to stable dayXX folders using EXIF first and mtime second.

Stories.StoryDescription: Read standard EXIF timestamp fields from supported images and parse them into datetimes.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The module returns EXIF capture datetimes when they are present and valid.

Stories.StoryDescription: Use the filesystem modified time when EXIF is missing or unreadable.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Photo records fall back to mtime when EXIF capture date is unavailable.

Stories.StoryDescription: Normalize timestamps to local calendar dates and derive ordered dayXX names from distinct dates.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Distinct dates map deterministically to day01, day02, and so on.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create day assignments that link a source file to its resolved trip day and timestamp source.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Day assignments expose source path, dayXX name, day index, and timestamp source.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests covering EXIF preference, mtime fallback, same-day grouping, and stable numbering.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unit tests verify EXIF-first behavior, fallback behavior, and stable day numbering.
